arts.ttl: 'Call me delusional' - Pep Guardiola makes Man City claim and praises 'amazing' Liverpool midfielder
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola responds to Manchester City's 2-0 defeat to Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool summer signing could be handed early exit route after just one start
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Federico Chiesa has had a tough time with injury since moving to Anfield but there is still interest from elsewhere in the former Juventus star

arts.ttl: Arne Slot says he has no sympathy for Pep Guardiola as Liverpool boss makes Man City claim
arts.sum: Arne Slot admits he does not feel sympathy for Pep Guardiola after Liverpool ensured Manchester City's winless run stretched to seven games

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah on future after Liverpool, Arne Slot Premier League title race victory against Manchester City
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah revealed that Sunday's victory against Manchester City could be his last game against Pep Guardiola's side at Anfield amidst contract uncertainty.

arts.ttl: How ‘excellent’ Van Dijk kept Haaland & Man City quiet
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundit David Moyes analyses Virgil van Dijk's "excellent" performance in Liverpool's 2-0 win over Manchester City at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane gives scathing Man City verdict as he agrees with Arne Slot on Liverpool title bid
arts.sum: Roy Keane pulled no punches in his assessment of Manchester City's performance in the defeat to Liverpool on Sunday as he hailed the work of Reds manager Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Manchester City star slammed for controversial Liverpool comment
arts.sum: Manchester City keeper Stefan Ortega gave away a penalty in his side's defeat to Liverpool and then found himself in hott water with Reds fans over his post-match interview

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola did not expect ‘sacked in the morning’ chants at Anfield
arts.sum: Manchester City have lost four Premier League games in a row.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher mocks Erling Haaland as he calls on football fans to end 'silly debate'
arts.sum: Erling Haaland blanked once again during crisis-ridden Manchester City's 2-0 defeat to Liverpool at Anfield on Sunday, with Virgil van Dijk getting the better of him

arts.ttl: Wild Kevin de Bruyne and Pep Guardiola feud theory gives Man City title race hope vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City are in a battle to finish in the top four of the Premier League, let alone win it, but a strange comment from Jamie Carragher could show a way back into the title race.
